violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Quaternary ammonia was test at levels higher than 500 PPM in the three compartment sink. Levels higher than 400 PPM noted on the products label could be harmful when improperly mixed.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): 2 cases of cups noted being stored on the floor in the kitchen.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung in kitchen and in rear storage area near walk in cooler.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Observed the counter end near the coffee not properly sealed.
